info.name: Account Posting Orchestrator
info.description: Complete test suite. Run in order using the Collection Runner — the first CREATE request sets collection variables (postingId, legId, configId) used by all subsequent requests.

exec: pm.test('First call succeeded — re-run this request to get 422', () => pm.expect(status).to.eql(201));
pm.test('All results have status SUCCESS', () => b.content.forEach(p => pm.expect(p.posting_status).to.eql('SUCCESS')));
pm.test('All results have source_name DMS', () => b.content.forEach(p => pm.expect(p.source_name).to.eql('DMS')));
pm.test('All results have request_type CBS_GL', () => b.content.forEach(p => pm.expect(p.request_type).to.eql('CBS_GL')));
pm.test('All results have CBS in target_systems', () => b.content.forEach(p => pm.expect(p.target_systems).to.include('CBS')));
pm.test('All results SUCCESS and DMS', () => b.content.forEach(p => {
pm.test('Has at least 15 seed entries', () => pm.expect(b.length).to.be.at.least(15));

item.name: Get config by request type - CBS_GL

exec: pm.test('All entries have request_type CBS_GL', () => b.forEach(c => pm.expect(c.request_type).to.eql('CBS_GL')));

item.name: Get config by request type - NPSS_PAYMENT
Get config - request type not found (empty array)

exec: pm.test('Returns empty array for unknown type', () => pm.expect(b).to.be.an('array').that.is.empty);

item.name: Error - Duplicate order_seq for same request_type
08 - Failure Simulation (Leg-level)
item.description: Uses StubSimulatorController (POST /test/stub/configure) to force specific systems to return FAILED. All results persist to DB — posting ends up PENDING (retryable), failed legs end up FAILED.

item.name: Leg 1 fails (CBS_POSTING) — DMS CBS_GL
item.description: CBS leg (leg 1) fails, GL leg (leg 2) succeeds. Posting saved as PENDING. Both legs persisted to DB.

exec: // Configure CBS to fail before this request
pm.test('posting_status is PENDING (retryable, not all legs succeeded)', () => pm.expect(b.posting_status).to.eql('PENDING'));

item.name: Verify Leg 1 fail — posting in DB as PENDING
Leg 2 fails (GL_POSTING) — DMS CBS_GL
item.description: CBS leg (leg 1) succeeds, GL leg (leg 2) fails. Posting saved as PENDING.

item.name: All legs fail (CBS + GL) — DMS CBS_GL
item.description: Both CBS and GL legs fail. Posting saved as PENDING. All legs FAILED in DB.

item.name: Single-leg failure — OBPM (DMS OBPM)
item.description: OBPM is the only leg and it fails. Posting saved as PENDING.

item.name: Retry after leg failure — restores SUCCESS
item.description: Clear the simulator so stubs succeed again, then retry the PENDING posting from the CBS failure test. Legs should go SUCCESS and posting promoted to SUCCESS.

exec: // Clear simulator — stubs will return SUCCESS on retry

item.name: Validation error — invalid source_name (persists FAILED to DB)
item.description: Posting is saved as PENDING first, then fails validation and is updated to FAILED in DB. The FAILED record is retrievable via GET.

item.name: Verify validation failure persisted as FAILED in DB
No config found — persists FAILED to DB
item.description: source_name and request_type are valid enums but no posting_config row exists for this combination. Posting saved as FAILED.

item.name: Verify no-config failure persisted as FAILED in DB
